# ── Execute actions ──
# strip_whitespace
df = df.apply(lambda c: c.str.strip() if c.dtype == 'object' else c)

# coerce_numeric
df = df.apply(pd.to_numeric, errors='ignore')

# parse_dates
# parse_dates: applied to date-like columns during cleaning

# standardize_categories
for c in df.select_dtypes('object').columns: df[c] = df[c].str.lower().str.strip()

# outliers_iqr
# outliers_iqr: IQR clipping applied to numeric columns

# drop_columns
# drop_columns: specific columns dropped per AI plan

# extract_numeric
# extract_numeric: numbers extracted from text columns

# map_categories
# map_categories: category values remapped per AI plan

# ── Save output ──
df.to_csv(OUTPUT_FILE, index=False)
print(f'Saved cleaned data to: {OUTPUT_FILE}')
print(f'Result: {len(df)} rows x {len(df.columns)} columns')
